title: Naukri Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Naukri Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Naukri Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Naukri Digital Technologies:
Naukri Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri Digital Technologies!
